200	
201				svgSel
202					.append('defs')
203					.append('marker')
204					.attr('id', 'ddx-arrow')
205					.attr('viewBox', '0 -5 10 10')
206					.attr('refX', 28)
207					.attr('refY', 0)
208					.attr('markerWidth', 6)
209					.attr('markerHeight', 6)
210					.attr('orient', 'auto')
211					.append('path')
212					.attr('d', 'M0,-5L10,0L0,5')
213					.attr('fill', 'currentColor')
214					.attr('class', 'text-fg-muted dark:text-dark-fg-muted')
215	
216				const g = svgSel.append('g')
217	
218				zoom = d3
219					.zoom<SVGSVGElement, unknown>()
220					.scaleExtent([0.05, 10])
221					.on('zoom', (event) => {
222						g.attr('transform', event.transform.toString())
223					})
224					.on('end', (event) => {
225						if (onTransformChange) {
226							onTransformChange({
227								x: event.transform.x,
228								y: event.transform.y,
229								k: event.transform.k
230							})
231						}
232					})
233	
234				svgSel.call(zoom)
235				svgSel.on('dblclick.zoom', null)
236	
237				// Apply initialTransform immediately if provided
238				if (capturedInitialTransform) {
239					svgSel.call(
240						zoom.transform,
241						d3.zoomIdentity
242							.translate(capturedInitialTransform.x, capturedInitialTransform.y)
243							.scale(capturedInitialTransform.k)
244					)
245				}
246	
247				const freshSimNodes: SimNode[] = currentNodes.map((n) => ({ ...n }))
248				const freshNodeById = new Map(freshSimNodes.map((n) => [n.id, n]))
249				const freshSimLinks = currentLinks
250					.filter((l) => freshNodeById.has(l.source) && freshNodeById.has(l.target))
251					.map((l) => ({ source: l.source, target: l.target }))
252	
253				// Per-node degree (in + out), used to tune charge and link distance so
254				// that high-degree hubs get more breathing room than tree leaves.
255				const degree = new Map<string, number>()
256				for (const n of freshSimNodes) degree.set(n.id, 0)
257				for (const l of freshSimLinks) {
258					degree.set(l.source, (degree.get(l.source) ?? 0) + 1)
259					degree.set(l.target, (degree.get(l.target) ?? 0) + 1)
260				}
261	
262				simulation = d3
263					.forceSimulation(freshSimNodes)
264					.force(
265						'link',
266						d3
267							.forceLink<SimNode, (typeof freshSimLinks)[0]>(freshSimLinks)
268							.id((d) => d.id)
269							.distance((l: any) => {
270								const ds = degree.get(typeof l.source === 'object' ? l.source.id : l.source) ?? 0
271								const dt = degree.get(typeof l.target === 'object' ? l.target.id : l.target) ?? 0
272								return 140 + 18 * Math.min(ds + dt, 10)
273							})
274							.strength(0.4)
275					)
276					.force(
277						'charge',
278						d3.forceManyBody<SimNode>().strength((d) => {
279							const k = degree.get(d.id) ?? 0
280							return -450 - 90 * Math.min(k, 10)
281						})
282					)
283					.force('center', d3.forceCenter(width / 2, height / 2))
284					.force('collide', labelAwareCollide<SimNode>(8))
285					// Bounded convergence: faster decay (~120 ticks) so settle reliably
286					// finishes within ~2 s on 128-node graphs in the browser.
287					.alphaDecay(0.05)
288					.velocityDecay(0.5)
289	
290				const linkSel = g
291					.append('g')
292					.selectAll<SVGLineElement, (typeof freshSimLinks)[0]>('line')
293					.data(freshSimLinks)
294					.join('line')
295					.attr('class', 'text-fg-muted dark:text-dark-fg-muted')
296					.attr('stroke', 'currentColor')
297					.attr('stroke-width', 1.5)
298					.attr('stroke-opacity', 0.85)
299					.attr('marker-end', 'url(#ddx-arrow)')
300	
301				const nodeGroup = g
302					.append('g')
303					.selectAll<SVGGElement, SimNode>('g')
304					.data(freshSimNodes)
305					.join('g')
306					.style('cursor', onNodeClick ? 'pointer' : 'grab')
307	
308				nodeGroup
309					.append('circle')
